error_signature: No binary data exists on item!
title: Missing binary data in Outlook email attachment
symptom: The email sent via the Microsoft Outlook node does not include the intended PDF attachment, and the error 'No binary data exists on item!' is displayed.
applies_when: Fetching PDF via HTTP Request node
not_this_if: Binary data is correctly passed from another source
root_cause: The error occurs because the binary data fetched from the HTTP Request node is not properly passed to the Microsoft Outlook node, often due to incorrect node connections or missing merge steps in the workflow.
fix_steps: Check the connections between nodes to ensure they are correctly set up.
Add a Merge node to combine the binary data before it reaches the Microsoft Outlook node.
Test the workflow again to confirm the attachment is sent.
agent_instruction: Ensure the binary data is properly merged and passed to the Microsoft Outlook node.
